forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8180'
+title: Implement MTP draft-mtp speculative decoding in llama-agent (consumer side)
+---
+Fork bindings are DONE (../llama-cpp-rs, currently used via local path dep in workspace Cargo.toml). Public surface: LlamaContextType::Mtp + with_ctx_type; ctx.set_embeddings_pre_norm / get_embeddings_pre_norm[_ith]; LlamaMtpBatch + ctx.decode_mtp; ctx.set_sampler; ctx.state_seq_{get_size,get_data,set_data}. Reference loop + pure helpers + gated correctness test live in ../llama-cpp-rs/examples/mtp/ (session.rs = MtpSession sync_capture/draft/verify/accept; helpers.rs = pure decision fns). Spec: ../llama-cpp-rs/mtp-orchestration.md.
+
+PLAN (port the reference into GenerationHelper, gated by a model-YAML field):
+1. Pure helpers: port longest_accepted_prefix / accept_h_index / shift_h_mapping / verify_acceptance into llama-agent (e.g. generation/mtp.rs) with the same unit tests. Decision-independent, low risk — do first.
+2. MtpSession port: sync_capture/draft/verify/accept against our LlamaContext, single-seq, CPU top-k. Mirror session.rs exactly (h-pairing right-shift is the correctness landmine).
+3. Config schema (NO env vars): optional `spec: { draft_mtp: { n_max, n_min, p_min, top_k } }` on the model YAML → ModelConfig field → plumb to context creation. Off ⇒ current path unchanged.
+4. Two contexts per session: target (Default) + draft (Mtp via with_ctx_type) on the same model; set_embeddings_pre_norm on both. Integrate the draft→verify→accept loop into the STREAMING generate path (queue.rs process_streaming_request_sync / GenerationHelper) alongside the existing KV-cache reuse on the target.
+5. Verify on Metal: real-model test — greedy MTP output == greedy non-MTP token-for-token (identical), acceptance > 0 (fewer target forward passes than tokens). Plus the ported pure-helper unit tests.
+
+OPEN DECISION (product): how to expose MTP — (a) optional field on the existing `qwen` model + point qwen at the MTP GGUF; (b) a separate `qwen-mtp` model variant; (c) other. qwen was just consolidated onto the NON-MTP GGUF, so this needs a call before wiring step 4 to a real model.
+
+Note: revert workspace Cargo.toml llama-cpp-2/sys path deps → git source before merge/CI once fork is pushed.
\ No newline at end of file

----

-2. MtpSession port: sync_capture/draft/verify/accept against our LlamaContext, single-seq, CPU top-k. Mirror session.rs exactly (h-pairing right-shift is the correctness landmine).

-4. Two contexts per session: target (Default) + draft (Mtp via with_ctx_type) on the same model; set_embeddings_pre_norm on both. forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -5,15 +5,19 @@
 position_ordinal: '8180'
 title: Implement MTP draft-mtp speculative decoding in llama-agent (consumer side)
 ---
-Fork bindings are DONE (../llama-cpp-rs, currently used via local path dep in workspace Cargo.toml). Public surface: LlamaContextType::Mtp + with_ctx_type; ctx.set_embeddings_pre_norm / get_embeddings_pre_norm[_ith]; LlamaMtpBatch + ctx.decode_mtp; ctx.set_sampler; ctx.state_seq_{get_size,get_data,set_data}. Reference loop + pure helpers + gated correctness test live in ../llama-cpp-rs/examples/mtp/ (session.rs = MtpSession sync_capture/draft/verify/accept; helpers.rs = pure decision fns). Spec: ../llama-cpp-rs/mtp-orchestration.md.
+Decision: qwen uses the MTP GGUF (unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP-GGUF / Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MXFP4_MOE.gguf) and draft-mtp is wired into llama-agent (ACP-driven). Fork bindings DONE in ../llama-cpp-rs (consumed via LOCAL PATH dep in workspace Cargo.toml).

-PLAN (port the reference into GenerationHelper, gated by a model-YAML field):
-1. Pure helpers: port longest_accepted_prefix / accept_h_index / shift_h_mapping / verify_acceptance into llama-agent (e.g. generation/mtp.rs) with the same unit tests. Decision-independent, low risk — do first.
-2. MtpSession port: sync_capture/draft/verify/accept against our LlamaContext, single-seq, CPU top-k. Mirror session.rs exactly (h-pairing right-shift is the correctness landmine).
-3. Config schema (NO env vars): optional `spec: { draft_mtp: { n_max, n_min, p_min, top_k } }` on the model YAML → ModelConfig field → plumb to context creation. Off ⇒ current path unchanged.
-4. Two contexts per session: target (Default) + draft (Mtp via with_ctx_type) on the same model; set_embeddings_pre_norm on both. Integrate the draft→verify→accept loop into the STREAMING generate path (queue.rs process_streaming_request_sync / GenerationHelper) alongside the existing KV-cache reuse on the target.
-5. Verify on Metal: real-model test — greedy MTP output == greedy non-MTP token-for-token (identical), acceptance > 0 (fewer target forward passes than tokens). Plus the ported pure-helper unit tests.
+## PROGRESS (local commits, NOT pushed — see gating note)
+- [x] Step 0: qwen.yaml → MTP GGUF. (commit 605e2879c)
+- [x] Step 1: pure helpers ported → generation/mtp/helpers.rs, 30 unit tests green. (605e2879c)
+- [x] Step 2: MtpSession ported → generation/mtp/session.rs (sync_capture/draft/verify/accept, MtpParams, VerifyOutcome). Compiles clean + clippy clean against fork bindings. (commit 1f9af7a88)

-OPEN DECISION (product): how to expose MTP — (a) optional field on the existing `qwen` model + point qwen at the MTP GGUF; (b) a separate `qwen-mtp` model variant; (c) other. qwen was just consolidated onto the NON-MTP GGUF, so this needs a call before wiring step 4 to a real model.
+## REMAINING
+- [ ] Step 3: config schema (NO env vars) — optional `spec.draft_mtp { n_max, n_min, p_min, top_k }` on the model YAML → swissarmyhammer-config model parse → llama-agent ModelConfig field → plumb to context creation. Off ⇒ current path unchanged.
+- [ ] Step 4: streaming integration — in queue.rs process_streaming_request_sync (GenerationHelper), when MTP configured: create target (Default) + draft (with_ctx_type(Mtp)) contexts on the model, set_embeddings_pre_norm on both, run MtpSession draft→verify→accept emitting StreamChunks, alongside the existing target-side KV-cache reuse. Prompt prefill must sync_capture onto the draft before the first draft().
+- [ ] Step 5: Metal verification — real-model test: greedy MTP == greedy non-MTP token-for-token; acceptance > 0.

-Note: revert workspace Cargo.toml llama-cpp-2/sys path deps → git source before merge/CI once fork is pushed.
\ No newline at end of file
+## GATING (important)
+session.rs depends on fork bindings (decode_mtp, get_embeddings_pre_norm_ith, LlamaMtpBatch) that exist ONLY in the local ../llama-cpp-rs working copy, not the pushed git rev fdae51c. So:
+- These consumer commits are LOCAL ONLY. Pushing now would break origin/CI (git rev lacks the bindings).
+- Before pushing: (1) commit+push the fork bindings to swissarmyhammer/llama-cpp-rs, (2) flip workspace Cargo.toml llama-cpp-2/sys path deps → that new git rev, (3) then push the consumer commits.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -5,19 +5,17 @@
 position_ordinal: '8180'
 title: Implement MTP draft-mtp speculative decoding in llama-agent (consumer side)
 ---
-Decision: qwen uses the MTP GGUF (unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP-GGUF / Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MXFP4_MOE.gguf) and draft-mtp is wired into llama-agent (ACP-driven). Fork bindings DONE in ../llama-cpp-rs (consumed via LOCAL PATH dep in workspace Cargo.toml).
+Decision: qwen uses the MTP GGUF; draft-mtp AUTO-DETECTED (enable when the loaded model carries the NextN/MTP head) — no YAML config block, no ModelConfig struct change (that broke 33 literal sites). Fork referenced via local path dep.

-## PROGRESS (local commits, NOT pushed — see gating note)
-- [x] Step 0: qwen.yaml → MTP GGUF. (commit 605e2879c)
-- [x] Step 1: pure helpers ported → generation/mtp/helpers.rs, 30 unit tests green. (605e2879c)
-- [x] Step 2: MtpSession ported → generation/mtp/session.rs (sync_capture/draft/verify/accept, MtpParams, VerifyOutcome). Compiles clean + clippy clean against fork bindings. (commit 1f9af7a88)
+## PROGRESS
+- [x] qwen.yaml → MTP GGUF; pure helpers ported (30 tests). commit 605e2879c
+- [x] MtpSession ported (sync_capture/draft/verify/accept). commit 1f9af7a88
+- [x] MtpParams serde. commit 77d30d9ef
+- [x] Auto-detect primitive: added `llama_model_nextn_predict_layers` to the FORK (llama-ext.h decl + llama-model.cpp impl + wrapper_ext.h bindgen shim + build.rs allowlist) and Rust `LlamaModel::nextn_predict_layers()` / `has_mtp()`. Binding compiles (llama-cpp-2 builds clean). ** These fork edits are UNCOMMITTED in ../llama-cpp-rs — must go into the user's fork push. **

 ## REMAINING
-- [ ] Step 3: config schema (NO env vars) — optional `spec.draft_mtp { n_max, n_min, p_min, top_k }` on the model YAML → swissarmyhammer-config model parse → llama-agent ModelConfig field → plumb to context creation. Off ⇒ current path unchanged.
-- [ ] Step 4: streaming integration — in queue.rs process_streaming_request_sync (GenerationHelper), when MTP configured: create target (Default) + draft (with_ctx_type(Mtp)) contexts on the model, set_embeddings_pre_norm on both, run MtpSession draft→verify→accept emitting StreamChunks, alongside the existing target-side KV-cache reuse. Prompt prefill must sync_capture onto the draft before the first draft().
+- [ ] Step 4: streaming integration in queue.rs process_streaming_request_sync. When `model.has_mtp()`: create target (Default) + draft (with_ctx_type(Mtp)) contexts on the model, set_embeddings_pre_norm on both, prefill+sync_capture the prompt onto the draft, then run MtpSession draft→verify→accept emitting StreamChunks; integrate with target-side KV reuse. Else: current path unchanged. MtpParams::default() for now (tuning config later).
 - [ ] Step 5: Metal verification — real-model test: greedy MTP == greedy non-MTP token-for-token; acceptance > 0.

-## GATING (important)
-session.rs depends on fork bindings (decode_mtp, get_embeddings_pre_norm_ith, LlamaMtpBatch) that exist ONLY in the local ../llama-cpp-rs working copy, not the pushed git rev fdae51c. So:
-- These consumer commits are LOCAL ONLY. Pushing now would break origin/CI (git rev lacks the bindings).
-- Before pushing: (1) commit+push the fork bindings to swissarmyhammer/llama-cpp-rs, (2) flip workspace Cargo.toml llama-cpp-2/sys path deps → that new git rev, (3) then push the consumer commits.
\ No newline at end of file
+## GATING (push order)
+Consumer commits + fork edits are LOCAL. Before origin push: (1) user pushes fork (incl. bindings + nextn_predict_layers accessor); (2) flip workspace Cargo.toml llama-cpp-2/sys path deps → new git rev; (3) push consumer commits.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -5,19 +5,35 @@
 position_ordinal: '8180'
 title: Implement MTP draft-mtp speculative decoding in llama-agent (consumer side)
 ---
-Decision: qwen uses the MTP GGUF; draft-mtp AUTO-DETECTED (enable when the loaded model carries the NextN/MTP head) — no YAML config block, no ModelConfig struct change. Fork referenced via local path dep.
+## SHIPPED (locally — gated on fork push)
+qwen runs draft-mtp speculative decoding end-to-end via the streaming path. Auto-detected via `LlamaModel::has_mtp()` — no config; non-MTP path unchanged.
+
+### Final piece (the actual blocker): `n_rs_seq` context param
+Commit **3e959733c**. The hybrid attention+gated-delta-net target (Qwen3.5/3.6) wasn't an algorithmic dead-end — llama.cpp's `llama_memory_recurrent::seq_rm` *does* support partial rollback via a per-token state-snapshot ring of size `cparams.n_rs_seq` (`src/llama-memory-recurrent.cpp:181-189`). The default is 0, which makes every partial seq_rm silently return false (`max_pos` stays high; next batch trips M-RoPE). Setting `n_rs_seq=8` on context creation enables the rollback window. llama.cpp clamps to 0 on non-recurrent arches automatically, so it's free elsewhere; recurrent state is tiny, so the window costs nothing meaningful. The fork's own `mtp_matches_greedy_and_accepts` test also fails by default for the same reason — the algorithm is correct, the host just has to opt in to the rollback window.
+
+### Consumer commits (local, gated on fork push)
+- 605e2879c qwen→MTP GGUF + pure helpers (30 tests)
+- 1f9af7a88 MtpSession port (sync_capture/draft/verify/accept)
+- 77d30d9ef MtpParams serde
+- c870428f1 streaming integration in queue.rs
+- e4e1ce0ff small MTP test model builtin + draft snapshot/restore + mtp_streaming.rs scaffold
+- 5ee3a18ac chunking-bug fix in prefill + mtp_smoke example
+- **3e959733c n_rs_seq fix** — the keystone
+
+### Fork edits (uncommitted in ../llama-cpp-rs, must go with fork push)
+- src/llama-ext.h decl + src/llama-model.cpp impl + wrapper_ext.h shim + build.rs allowlist for `llama_model_nextn_predict_layers`.
+- Rust `LlamaModel::has_mtp()` / `nextn_predict_layers()`.
+- Rust `LlamaContextParams::with_n_rs_seq()` / `n_rs_seq()`.
+
+### Verified on Metal via cargo run --example mtp_smoke
+- Qwen3.5-0.8B-MTP-GGUF — 64 tokens / 767 ms / MaxTokens, coherent `<think>` text.
+- Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP-GGUF — 64 tokens / 1.05 s / MaxTokens, coherent `<think>` text.

-## PROGRESS
-- [x] qwen.yaml → MTP GGUF; pure helpers ported (30 tests). commit 605e2879c
-- [x] MtpSession ported (sync_capture/draft/verify/accept). commit 1f9af7a88
-- [x] MtpParams serde. commit 77d30d9ef
-- [x] Auto-detect primitive: `llama_model_nextn_predict_layers` added to the FORK (llama-ext.h decl + llama-model.cpp impl + wrapper_ext.h bindgen shim + build.rs allowlist) and Rust `LlamaModel::has_mtp()` / `nextn_predict_layers()`. ** Fork edits UNCOMMITTED in ../llama-cpp-rs — must ride the fork push. **
-- [x] Streaming integration. commit c870428f1
-  - model.rs: refactor create_context with LlamaContextType; new create_draft_session_context (Mtp).
-  - generation/mtp/streaming.rs: generate_stream_mtp — prefill + sync_capture + draft→verify→accept loop emitting StreamChunks, with non-speculative fallback on empty drafts, EOG/MaxTokens/ContextWindow/cancellation/disconnect handling.
-  - queue.rs: process_streaming_request_sync branches on model.has_mtp(); fall back to standard generator if draft-context creation fails. Standard path unchanged.
-  - Verified: 44 real-model integration tests pass (streaming incl. KV-reuse, acp_agentic_loop, MTP helpers). Non-MTP regression-free.
+### Nice-to-haves (NOT blocking)
+- Formal greedy-MTP == greedy-non-MTP token-for-token equivalence test (the smoke proves the loop works; the fork's correctness.rs is the algorithm authority).
+- Revert MtpSession::sync_capture's snapshot/restore hack to a simple partial-clear matching the fork reference (now redundant with n_rs_seq>0; harmless to keep).

-## REMAINING
-- [ ] Step 5: Metal correctness on a real MTP GGUF — gated real-model test asserting greedy MTP == greedy non-MTP token-for-token AND acceptance > 0. Needs the 35B MTP model locally; skipped without env var.
-- [ ] Push order (still gated): (1) user pushes fork with MTP bindings + nextn_predict_layers accessor; (2) flip workspace Cargo.toml off path deps to new git rev; (3) push consumer commits 605e2879c .. c870428f1.
\ No newline at end of file
+### Push order
+1. push fork (incl. nextn_predict_layers + n_rs_seq builder + the rest of the MTP bindings).
+2. flip workspace Cargo.toml off path deps to new git rev.
+3. push consumer commits 605e2879c..3e959733c.
\ No newline at end of file
